---
title: "Contact"
---

Feel free to reach out if you want to discuss actuarial modeling, R programming, or potential collaborations!

<br>

<div style="text-align: center; margin-top: 40px;">
  <a href="mailto:your.email@example.com" style="display: inline-block; padding: 12px 24px; background-color: #007bff; color: white; text-decoration: none; font-weight: bold; border-radius: 5px; font-size: 1.1em;">
    ✉️ Send Me an Email
  </a>
</div>
